title: RaceProgress bin count 200 to 300
summary: Increase RaceProgress discretization from 200 bins to 300 bins.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the RaceProgress binning resolution from 200 to 300 where that block exists. Keep every other feature and model setting unchanged.
expected_effect: Test whether finer race-progress timing improves pit-stop ranking.
risk: Finer bins may create sparse categories and overfit.
